Describe each step of the interaction with the machine as it happens in the video.
canonical_answer: At 8s, a person kneels beside the blue industrial machine with hoses attached; at 12s, the person connects a blue hose to the lower port; at 16s, the person lifts a blue metal plate revealing a filter; at 18s, the person presses a white object onto the top surface.

canonical_answer: The person lifts the blue metal plate to reveal a cylindrical filter inside.
